context: Synthetic example. A capital allocator routed through the attribution instrument — NOT the product instrument. Fewer than three sourced attribution fields blocks the verdict and returns a neutral pull-list.

claims.statement: Fund size disclosed in an exempt-offering filing.
Claims lead-investor status on several wins; not independently sourced.
Board roles asserted on portfolio company pages; not yet cross-sourced.
Entry round and timing not yet sourced against the cap table.
Wins claimed on the firm page; platform vs personal vs in-the-room attribution unresolved.
